top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN u.Reputation > 1000 THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
WHERE strftime('%Y', p.CreaionDate) = '2011';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN u.Reputation > 1000 THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
WHERE strftime('%Y', p.CreaionDate) = '2011';

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN u.Reputation > 1000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage
FROM posts p
INNER JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
WHERE strftime('%Y', p.CreaionDate) = '2011';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN u.Reputation > 1000 THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
WHERE strftime('%Y', p.CreaionDate) = '2011';

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN u.Reputation > 1000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage
FROM posts p
INNER JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
WHERE strftime('%Y', p.CreaionDate) = '2011';

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN u.Reputation > 1000 THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
WHERE strftime('%Y', p.CreaionDate) = '2011';

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN u.Reputation > 1000 THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
WHERE strftime('%Y', p.CreaionDate) = '2011';
